message:
refactor(conformance): tighten mock spec schema + update fixtures

Schema changes (docs/schema/mock_spec.json):
- http_match: require at least one of url_exact/url_prefix/url_pattern
  via anyOf constraint
- exec_match: require at least one of cmd_exact/cmd_prefix/cmd_pattern
- tool_invocation_rule: relax required from [name, result] to [name]
  (result can now be omitted for capture-only rules)
- Clean up descriptions: remove default-value mentions that belong in
  implementation, clarify body/body_json mutual exclusivity

Fixture updates:
- mock_spec_default.json: correct active_tools to [read, write, edit,
  bash, grep, find, ls] (was missing edit/find/ls, had glob instead of
  find); remove claude-opus-4-5 from available_models
- mock_spec_with_http.json: simplify by removing 3 redundant exec rules
  (git diff --stat, git stash, git log --oneline); remove null
  expected_response from turn_end event fire entry

Formatting-only changes in mock_spec_validation.rs (no logic changes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
